## Screenshots / Evidence

Add screenshots, terminal captures, or artifact paths when UI, docs, or operator-facing behavior changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Kept the diff focused and avoided unrelated rewrites
- [ ] Preserved paper-first and local-first runtime behavior
- [ ] Checked secret/log/artifact exposure when touching providers, sidecars, Web routes, observer API, runtime files, or CI
- [ ] Updated version metadata for product-impacting branch pushes when requested by the owner
- [ ] Updated docs or `.ai` notes when assumptions changed
- [ ] Ran the smallest useful validation for this change
